brief.headline: Walmart reins in employee AI use as costs hit the balance sheet
brief.why_it_matters: A cautionary cost-control case — exactly the budget reality to raise before a client over-commits to AI.

brief.headline: Shell deploys C3 AI agents to automate predictive maintenance
brief.why_it_matters: A named enterprise automation/ROI case study you can cite when pitching operational AI.

brief.headline: Marketers must rethink loyalty as AI reshapes consumer connections
brief.why_it_matters: Over half of consumers will filter brand comms through AI — a strategic angle to bring to marketing clients.

items.headline: Amazon opens its AI shopping assistant to retailers, starting with Kate Spade
items.why_it_matters: A deployable shopping assistant clients can put on their own storefronts — a ready cost-saving offer.

items.headline: Meta Business Agent automates conversational commerce in Instagram & Messenger
items.why_it_matters: Handles transactions and support without humans — a concrete play for social-commerce clients.

items.headline: Meta rolls out an AI creator assistant on Facebook
items.why_it_matters: Answers 'when should I post?' from a creator's own data — directly useful for the social clients she serves.

items.headline: Microsoft Scout: an agentic 'Autopilot' that works across M365
items.why_it_matters: Agentic automation across Office apps — material for the ops-cost-reduction conversation.

items.headline: Apple approves Poke as the first AI agent on Messages for Business
items.why_it_matters: A new AI customer-engagement channel to advise brands on early.

items.headline: Shell deploys C3 AI agents to automate predictive maintenance
items.why_it_matters: A named enterprise automation/ROI case study you can cite when pitching operational AI.

items.headline: GitHub Copilot moves to token-based billing — and users see price hikes
items.why_it_matters: The shift to usage-based AI pricing reshapes every client's cost model and ROI math.

items.headline: DoorDash upgrades its ad platform with a LiveRamp pact and premium formats
items.why_it_matters: Retail-media expansion clients can tap for measurable performance spend.

items.headline: Anthropic's IPO filing marks AI maturing into an enterprise utility
items.why_it_matters: Signals AI shifting from experiment to procurement line-item — the framing for enterprise pitches.
